# MC Tickets — Your Ticket Concierge

> MC Tickets is a private ticket concierge based in Melbourne, Australia. We provide premium hospitality access — Medallion Club, corporate suites, hero seats, dining packages — at the MCG, Marvel Stadium, Rod Laver Arena, Albert Park and venues nationally. Membership is by referral. All pricing is on application.

Operated by: Ormond Nominees (Victoria) Pty Ltd, ABN 32 629 402 704
Trading as: MC Tickets
Contact: sales@mctickets.com.au
Event Day Support: +61 449 972 955
Tagline: Your Ticket Concierge
Service area: Melbourne and Australia-wide
Membership: By referral only
Pricing model: POA (Price On Application)

## How it works

1. Send a message — text, WhatsApp, email or call. Tell us the event, date, seat count and party.
2. We curate options — within hours, the best available across Medallion Club, corporate boxes and premium dining. Confirmed price before commitment.
3. Delivered and done — tickets land on the member's phone, dining is booked, and the member walks in without queues, apps or stress.

## What we provide access to

- **AFL**: Medallion Club, corporate suites, Level 1 reserve. MCG, Marvel Stadium and every venue nationally. Home and away rounds, finals, AFL Grand Final.
- **NRL & State of Origin**: Origin matches at the MCG, NRL finals, Melbourne Storm home fixtures. Premium seating and hospitality.
- **Concerts & Tours**: Front-of-stage, VIP, after-parties for international tours, stadium shows and boutique venues.
- **Formula 1**: Australian Grand Prix at Albert Park. Paddock Club, Champions Club, Formula One Paddock access.
- **Australian Open**: Rod Laver Arena, Margaret Court Arena, AO Club. Night sessions and finals. Single seats or full hospitality.
- **International & Premium**: Melbourne Cup Carnival, Boxing Day Test, cricket tests, rugby internationals, one-off premium events.

## Trust signals

- Operating for 10+ years
- Over 1,000 active members
- Most last-minute requests filled within 48 hours
- Zero public pricing — every quote tailored to the member

## Audience

Senior professionals, business owners, executives, surgeons, lawyers, founders, and corporate hosts who value time, discretion, and certainty over cost. Common use cases: client entertainment, milestone celebrations (40ths, anniversaries, milestone games), die-hard fan attendance.

## Policies

- All enquiries and bookings are routed through human concierge — there is no self-service checkout
- Privacy: see /privacy (Australian Privacy Principles, Privacy Act 1988)
- Pricing confirmed before commitment
- Tickets delivered digitally
- Hospitality dining and pre-show inclusions arranged where applicable

## Contact

Enquiries: sales@mctickets.com.au
Event Day Support: 0449 972 955
Based: Melbourne, Victoria, Australia
Website: https://mctickets.com.au
